findings.message: Package installation without --ignore-scripts flag is security-sensitive. Package managers automatically execute shell scripts during installation, which can be exploited if a dependency is compromised. Use --ignore-scripts flag to disable automatic script execution (e.g., 'npm install --ignore-scripts').
